perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with black curly hair is seen from the back, hands clasped in prayer before a digital background of a traditional Chinese red temple with lanterns and falling petals. (2) The scene cuts to a white cloud environment where a person dressed as a bearded deity in red robes stands next to a woman in a light blue traditional dress (the Fairy). They gesture and look down as if observing the man. (3) The Fairy character appears in the temple scene, now dressed in a blue Chun-Li costume with hair buns; she performs rapid martial arts kicks and punches directed toward the man, who reacts with surprise. (4) The woman in the Chun-Li costume holds a large black suitcase labeled 'DMZ' and points to a smartphone, showcasing game content. (5) The video concludes with high-energy promotional graphics of characters from Call of Duty and Street Fighter 6, followed by the woman making a playful 'call me' gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, medium-tempo background track featuring traditional Chinese instrumental accents over a modern electronic beat. A male voice speaks with a hopeful, pleading tone. (2) The music continues as an older-sounding, slightly raspy voice (the Deity) and a bright, energetic female voice (the Fairy) engage in a humorous dialogue. (3) Rapid-fire 'swish' and 'thud' sound effects (SFX) are layered over the music to synchronize with martial arts movements. (4) The female voice transitions into a loud, excited promotional tone, mentioning 'Call of Duty' and '6th Anniversary'. (5) The video ends with a loud, final slap/hitting SFX.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White and purple subtitles translate the man's dialogue regarding his wish for a 'perfect girlfriend'. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Character labels appear over the actors: '神明' (Deity) and '仙女' (Fairy). (3) Hook Text: Large bold characters like '決勝時刻' (Call of Duty), '六週年啦' (6th Anniversary!), and '快打旋風6聯名' (Street Fighter 6 Collab) appear with a high-energy, celebratory tone. (4) Functional Text: Details about game rewards like '六週年大禮包' (6th Anniversary Big Gift Pack) and the new 'DMZ' mode are displayed clearly.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a sketch logic: Intro (Wish) -> Turning Point (Deity's intervention) -> Climax/Product Demo (Chun-Li promotion) -> Outro.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator, 1 female lead (as Fairy/Chun-Li), 1 person in Deity costume (appears female-coded in makeup).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character wears a white t-shirt; the main female character wears a blue martial arts outfit with white hair buns (Chun-Li cosplay).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Features a virtual temple with red pillars and lanterns, and a heavenly cloud scene for the deities.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Narrative Conflict -> Product Integration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a comedic promotional skit for the 6th anniversary of 'Call of Duty: Mobile' and its collaboration with 'Street Fighter 6'. It uses the trope of 'wishing to a deity' to humorously introduce the Chun-Li character, who then pivots to explaining game rewards and a new game mode (DMZ) to drive downloads and engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of game name, logos, anniversary rewards, and call to action for social media following.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style editing, cosplay integration, and 'call me' hand gesture signature.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends influencer-style comedy with high-production game assets to appeal to a younger gaming demographic.
